title: Device Settings - All toggles OFF - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle button states in Device Settings do not persist as OFF after closing and reopening tabs, returning to Device Home Screen, or restarting the app
steps: Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings
Set all toggle buttons (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.) to OFF
Verify all toggle buttons remain OFF
Return to the Device Home Screen
Verify all toggle buttons remain OFF
Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings
Verify all toggle buttons remain OFF
expected: All toggle buttons in Device Settings persist as OFF after closing and reopening tabs, returning to the Device Home Screen, and restarting the app.
